allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Count:', d.length\); console.log\('First:', JSON.stringify\(d[0], null, 2\).slice\(0,300\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Count:', len\(d\)\); print\('Has subject array:', isinstance\(d[0].get\('subject'\), list\)\); print\('Has subjects string:', 'subjects' in d[0]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Payments count:', len\(d\)\); print\('First:', d[0]['studentName'], d[0]['status'], d[0]['amount']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Attendance count:', len\(d\)\); print\('First:', d[0]['studentName'], d[0]['date'], d[0]['status']\)")
